full_text:
**How to set up Mesmer** (for Windows)

1. Installing Rust and Cargo (if you not already have it)

- Download rust installer via website:\
 <https://rustup.rs/>

- Download and run rustup-init.exe from the website

- Follow onscreen instructions

> (I used default settings)

For checking if the installation worked:

- Restart your terminal by closing and reopening PowerShell

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- Run:\
 rustc \--version

> cargo --version

- Output: version number confirms that rust and cargo are installed

2. Open Anaconda prompt

3. Create Environment:\
 conda create -n mesmer_env python=3.8\
 (DeepCell works with Python 3.8+)\
 Activate Environment:\
 conda activate mesmer_env

4. Install necessary packages :

pip install deepcell\
pip install tifffile opencv-python-headless scipy scikit-image
matplotlib numpy tensorflow
